reviewer.name: JiYong / Tars
reviewer.role: CornerStone owner and target decision owner

review_note: Reviewer answered yes to all four corpus-quality questions and described the corpus as good.
decision_rule: ACCEPT only when the reviewer confirms the frozen 25-case corpus is realistic for the VS5 decision-owner cohort, domain-specific enough to resist generic guessing, and representative of multi-source facts, conflicts, gaps, and answerable/unanswerable questions.
